resources.string: You gave Hatchy\'s advice a thumbs down. Tell us why so we can sharpen his wisdom.
Search by ID, Species, or Breed
Gratisbrukere kan fortsatt registrere flokker og klekking manuelt.
PRO adds genetic planning and pairing insights to sharpen your selection.
Gratisbrukere kan registrere grunnleggende inntekter og kostnader per post.
PRO gir avansert analyse og ROI-prognoser for hele driften din.
Koble deg med andre oppdrettere i kommende versjoner.
PRO users get early access to community knowledge and breed networking.
Oppdrett er der kyllinger vokser til de er klare for flokken.
Eggs hatch ? chicks go here ? later move to Flock
Use this for chicks bought or hatched outside the app.
Select species first to choose breeds.
Refine genetic confidence based on community benchmarks.
Manual Genetic Overrides require a PRO subscription.
Wait! Are you sure you want to remove \'%1$s\'? All your records for it will be lost forever.
Selected birds will be marked as deceased.
Status saved. Ticket already approved in Firestore.
Ticket resolved; related automation (country change) completed.
Status changes commit immediately to Firestore.
Are you sure you want to commit these changes to the global registry?
Select the traits you want to prioritize. The AI will find the best pair for you.
No birds in this flock yet.
No flocks yet. Start by adding one!
Readiness alerts for the adult flock
Hold oversikt over avl og inkubasjon
Sjekk tilgangen deres i Firestore umiddelbart.
If you select a breed here, it will automatically apply to all new birds added to this flock.\n\nFor a mixed flock, leave this empty and select breeds individually when adding birds.
Used by Breeding predictions until a stable line is established.
No traits set - breeding predictions may be less accurate.
Are you sure you want to delete this incubation batch? This cannot be undone.
Inkubering av egg fra denne flokken.
Select species first to choose breed.
Eggs count must be a positive number
No cost data available yet. Add costs to see insights.
Lockdown phase! Stop turning eggs and increase humidity.
Getting close! Prepare your brooder area.
Mid-incubation: Candle your eggs to check for development.
Tidlig fase: hold stabil temperatur og fuktighet. Vend eggene jevnlig.
Wait! Are you sure you want to remove this batch? All your records for it will be lost forever.
It is time to stop turning and lock down for hatching. Move eggs to a hatcher or lock down current device.
Select breeding goals above to find matches.
Species Mismatch: All selected birds must be the same species.
Overdreven bruk av hannen: denne faren har blitt brukt intensivt nylig. Vurder genetisk mangfold.
Low Diversity Detected: High trait overlap between sire and dam(s). Risk of inbreeding issues.
This will create a breeding record and temporarily lock these birds from other selections.
The breeding record has been created and the birds are now locked for this project.
Oppgrader til PRO for detaljert risikoanalyse, forventede resultater og strategisk trekk-scoring.
This pairing carries a high risk of lethal gene expression (25%%+ embryo mortality). To protect animal welfare, this confirmation is blocked.
This pairing has an estimated Inbreeding Coefficient > 25%. This significantly increases the risk of \'inbreeding depression\' and congenital deformities. Proceed with extreme caution.
HatchBase predictions are for educational purposes and based on Mendelian probabilities. Environmental factors and genetic mutations may lead to different outcomes.
Ingen kommersielle resultater eller utstillingskvalitet er garantert.
Hen demonstrates proven fertility with %1$d%% hatch rate across %2$d batches.
Faren utviser eksepsjonell fertilitet (%1$d%%) over %2$d avlssykluser.
Faren har en historikk med lav fertilitet (%1$d%%)
Strong alignment with %1$s goal. Key traits: %2$s
Mangfoldig avkom med potensial for hybridkraft
Begrenset genetisk mangfold kan redusere hybridkraften
CRITICAL: Siblings detected - high inbreeding risk
KRITISK: Forelder-barn-paring - alvorlig risiko for innavl
Cross-breed pairing (%1$s ÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€ Ã¢â‚¬â„¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â %2$s) supports diversity goals
F1-hybridavkom med potensial for unike trekkombinasjoner
Auto-sexing at hatch: Males Barred (Head Spot), Females Non-Barred (Solid).
Olive Egger potential: Blue structural shell + Brown overlay.
Offspring likely to lay Olive or Green eggs.
Naken hals er et dominant trekk.
Avkommet vil utvise trekket naken hals.
Chicks can be sexed by down color/pattern at hatch.
Far bidrar med: %1$s. Mor bidrar med: %2$s. Mangfold: %3$d%%
Far bidrar med: %1$s (+%2$d flere). Mor bidrar med: %3$s (+%4$d flere). Mangfold: %5$d%%
Based on the standards, this is a plausible start for a %1$s project. Keep an eye on the vitality.
Remember, nature\'s got a way of surprisin\' us, so these are potential patterns, not promises.
That\'s gettin\' into deep water. Master Breeder genetics insights are available on PRO plans.
Starting a new %1$s project is a big step. Focusing on %2$s is a strong plan, but genetics can still surprise you.
Multi-flock optimization requires a PRO subscription.
Choose the flocks you want to optimize across.
Select your objectives for this breeding cycle.
Results are probabilistic estimates based on known genetics. Actual outcomes may vary due to environmental factors and hidden traits.
Sales must be recorded via SalesBatch to ensure inventory and revenue consistency.
Finance analytics is unavailable for your current plan.
*Prisforslag er automatiserte og kun ment for planlegging.
Choose the plan that fits your homestead
Upgrade to unlock advanced tools for breeding, tracking, and community access.

Payment will be charged to your Google Play account.

Subscription renews automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.

Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the price of the selected plan.

You can manage or cancel your subscription in Google Play Settings.

Any unused portion of a free trial, if offered, will be forfeited when you purchase a subscription.
By subscribing you agree to our %1$s and %2$s.
This action is IRREVERSIBLE. All your data, flocks, and incubations will be permanently lost.
Bli med i HatchBase i dag
Har du allerede en konto? Logg inn
Har du ikke konto? Opprett en
Google Login is not configured yet.

You donÃƒÆ’Ã†â€™Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã…Â¡Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¬ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã…Â¾Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¢t have permission to change that setting. Some fields can only be updated through support or your subscription status.
Please sign in again and retry.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
You must accept the Terms and Privacy Policy.
Are you sure you want to delete this historical record? This action cannot be undone.
Execute and monitor your breeding projects.
What is your primary breeding goal?
AI-assisted multi-generational search using your specific birds for the best possible results.
Generate a roadmap for a new project using placeholders for external stock.
Unlock plan tracking and flock-level genetic guidance.
Plan and track your pairings here.
Spor inntekter, kostenader og prisinnsikt i hele driften.
Connect with other breeders, share knowledge, and learn from the community.
Eggs go to the Hatchery. Chicks move to the Nursery. Adults join the Flock. Track costs and sales at every stage of the journey.
No obvious issues detected based on these readings.
Valg av flokker vil hente genetisk innsikt...
Not yet synced with Google Play

Breeding scenarios act like a crystal ball for your flock. By analyzing the genetic blueprints of your birds, I can predict everything from egg color to feather patterns before you even set a single egg!
Hatchy Tip: Excellent for high-productivity brown egg layers.
Breeding and advanced finance tracking are part of HatchBase PRO. You can try them out, but some data may be locked. Would you like to continue with a free alternative?
No hidden backdoors. No partial access.\nProfessional tools for professional breeders.
Tap the button below to add your first bird
Detect lethal genes and inbreeding risks before they impact your hatch rate.
Standard incubation conditions. No special actions today.
Help improve the community database by reporting observed traits from your hatches.
Get alerts even when the app is closed.
Camera permission is required to scan.
Scanning (QR/OCR) is available in PRO. Upgrade to unlock ring scanning, incubator reading, and receipt scanning.
No breeds found for this species.
Predicted Outcome: Dark chocolate eggs with speckles.
Get personalized setup advice and pairing scores based on your specific flock goals.
Financial Insights are available on Pro and Expert plans.
Select if your bird is not a pure breed
Access shared breeding data and trait validations from expert keepers.
Trace traits across grandfathered lineages to map out long-term goals.
Incubator OCR scanning is available in PRO. Upgrade to unlock this feature.
Flock-based optimization is a PRO feature.
Strategic Planning is not available for %1$s with these target parameters yet. Try reducing trait domains.
Camera permission is required to take a photo.
HatchBase Community is on the way. Soon you’ll be able to learn, share, ask questions, and connect with other keepers and breeders.
You are pairing different species. This usually doesn\'t result in viable offspring without advanced hybrid techniques.
This pair carries a significant risk of lethal gene expression. A large portion of embryos may fail to develop.
Consider choosing a different sire or dam to ensure a healthy hatch.
These birds appear closely related based on observed lineages. This can lead to reduced vitality and health issues in chicks.
We recommend introducing a new bird from a different bloodline to maintain flock strength.
There is high overlap in the traits of this pair. This might slow down genetic improvement for your goals.
Try pairing with a bird that has more complementary traits.
This sire has been very active across many recent batches. Monitor his condition to ensure continued fertility.
Start from birds you already manage.
Optimize traits in your current line.
Build a new plan from target traits.
Manage and track active breeding cycles.
Design new genetics plans and simulate outcomes.
